defs: The act of arriving, or coming; the act of reaching a place from a distance, whether by water (as in its original sense) or by land.
quotes: Our watchmen from the towers, with longing eyes, Expect his swift arrival.

defs: The attainment or reaching of any object, by effort, or in natural course; as, our arrival at this conclusion was wholly unexpected.
The person or thing arriving or which has arrived; as, news brought by the last arrival.
quotes: Another arrival still more important was speedily announced.
The house has a corner arrival.
